formula.purpose: External transportability and paper-rigor evidence only. This does not update WearGait-PD internal T3 CCC and does not create a deployment headline.

current_internal_anchor.target: T3 valid-range corrected total MDS-UPDRS Part III

external_dataset.name: COPS: Continuous observation of Parkinsonian symptoms
external_dataset.recording_context: free-living continuous monitoring up to seven days
external_dataset.labels: UPDRS-III OFF/ON CSVs plus symptom diaries

target_sensitivities: mean of OFF and ON when both available
fixed_battery.feature_policy: magnitude-only, frame-invariant wrist accelerometry features; no axis-dependent features because COPS free-living wrist orientation is unconstrained.

sensor_policy.primary: right wrist only, matching WearGait right-wrist primary schema
sensor_policy.sensitivity: left wrist and bilateral mean-prediction fusion
sensor_policy.scale_assertion: raw acceleration in g; check wear-time magnitude distribution before scoring

B_zero_shot_clinical_plus_wrist.train: WearGait-PD only; iter47/iter5-style Stage 1 plus wrist residual

D_bilateral_sensitivity.train: same as Track A/B depending on branch

leakage_guards: COPS labels never enter WearGait model training or hyperparameter selection for Tracks A/B/D.
No COPS fine-tuning for zero-shot tracks.
No target-driven COPS window or subject filtering beyond pre-declared valid-label availability.
Track C is explicitly within-COPS LOOCV sanity and must not be described as external transportability.
No internal WearGait T3 canonical update is allowed from this experiment.
formula.expected_failure_mode: Protocol mismatch: WearGait structured gait/balance tasks versus COPS free-living wrist accelerometry. A weak or null zero-shot result is expected and publishable as transportability evidence.
formula.decision_after_probe: Run full iter49 only if OSF target files can be parsed without manual label inference and raw accelerometry scale/orientation checks pass.
